testcase.name: test_product_save_with_tiered_intake

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'internal' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb72e4754700>('pricing_type') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb72e4754700> = {'product': {'base_price': 50.0, 'bullets': [], 'bullets_included': None, 'card_bullets': None, ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_tiered_pricing_features.py:241: in test_product_save_with_tiered_intake assert product.get("pricing_type") == "internal" E AssertionError: assert None == 'internal' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb72e4754700>('pricing_type') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb72e4754700> = {'product': {'base_price': 50.0, 'bullets': [], 'bullets_included': None, 'card_bullets': None, ...}}.get
